rule: Before direct work, identify the domain and check that domain's registry/check_first surfaces for an existing script.

domains.label: REFER Script Factory
domains.scope: Codex/VS Code source, provider-neutral doctrine, extension scripts.

scripts.purpose: Authoritative VS Code extension and provider-neutral script contract registry.

discovered_package_scripts.name: test
discovered_package_scripts.command: npm run compile && node dist/test/metrics.test.js && node dist/test/processEvents.test.js && node dist/test/bootstrapDryRun.test.js && node dist/test/bootstrapApply.test.js && node dist/test/bootstrapProcessEvents.test.js && node dist/test/bootstrapHealth.test.js && node dist/test/codebaseMiles.test.js && node dist/test/codebases.test.js && node dist/test/scriptBlueprint.test.js && node dist/test/scriptDna.test.js && node dist/test/scriptographer.test.js && node dist/test/referIntake.test.js && node dist/test/referOrchestrator.test.js && node dist/test/referProcessEvents.test.js && node dist/test/referChatSession.test.js && node dist/test/referChatMode.test.js && node dist/test/referOrchestratorRunner.test.js && node dist/test/referTargetRegistry.test.js && node dist/test/referCoach.test.js && node dist/test/orchestratorRoadmap.test.js && node dist/test/factoryGaps.test.js && node dist/test/schemaValidation.test.js && node dist/test/lawToc.test.js && node dist/test/updateSync.test.js && node dist/test/factoryRegistries.test.js && node dist/test/authorityResolver.test.js && node dist/test/doctrineCompiler.test.js && node dist/test/scriptionaryTerm.test.js && node dist/test/modificationLoop.test.js

domains.label: Current Chat Surface
domains.scope: Token tracking, script-use logging, current-context reset, and chat-surface self-observation.

scripts.purpose: Log current Codex chat usage with 4 characters = 1 token estimates.
Log a context ceiling marker and start the current context total fresh.
Record reusable script execution in the same usage ledger.
Backfill zero-count current-chat ledger records with manual estimates.
Report zero-count current-chat records that need measured or manual usage.

domains.label: Hive Director
domains.scope: Cross-node identity, hive build plan, node heartbeat, and ratification status.

scripts.purpose: Render the current hive node map from the JSON registry.
Add or update a hive/factory node with role, account, datasets, scripts, and state.
Record node liveness, status, and ratification evidence.
Render the typed hive backlog and contract queue.
Emit a root-authoritative hive contract from a backlog item.
Dispatch a typed hive contract through the appropriate node lane and record evidence.
Validate decoded talkback against the typed hive contract before ratification.
Emit and dispatch governed build-intake contracts so Zo route changes originate from typed intake.
Build a non-mutating deployment checklist for staging and ratifying a hive node.
Capture live zo.space route state for a hive node and record upstream ratification evidence.

domains.label: REFER Zo Bootstrap
domains.scope: Zo computer bootstrap, file/API tandem, compression, dispatch, talkback, datasets, and live ratification.

scripts.purpose: Ship a contract to Zo, optionally trigger the runner, and fetch talkback.
Sync known tandem runtime files to a Zo computer through MCP/file API.
Verify bidirectional machine compression/decompression before transport use.
Run one Zo-side inbox contract and emit talkback.
Run/status the Zo node-local adaptive heartbeat, tightening during work and relaxing up to a 24-hour dormant pulse.
